compiled_state.title: scan-docs.sh: set -uo pipefail missing -e flag per project convention
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: Script uses 'set -uo pipefail' but omits '-e'. Project convention (other scripts in plugins/dso/scripts/) uses 'set -euo pipefail'. Without '-e', unhandled command failures may pass silently.
File: plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/scan-docs.sh
Category: hygiene
